title: Castle in the Sky
posterAlt: Castle in the Sky (1986) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A young boy and a girl with a magic crystal must race against pirates and foreign agents in a search for a legendary floating castle.
synopsis: Castle in the Sky is a 1986 adventure, fantasy and animation film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1980s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
